children.heading: Conservation Area
children.label: 1 Conservation Area
children.text: The term “Conservation Area” means the Fort Stanton-Snowy River Cave National Conservation Area established by .section 460yyy–1(a) of this title

children.heading: Management plan
children.label: 2 Management plan
children.text: The term “management plan” means the management plan developed for the Conservation Area under .section 460yyy–2(c) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior, acting through the Director of the Bureau of Land Management.
